mapper.sql: A.NUSER_AUT_SEQ, A.SUSER_ID, A.SUSER_GRADE_CD, A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

,B.SUSER_NM , B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID , C.SORG_NM AS SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM ,(SELECT STRING_AGG(SORG_NM,'-') FROM (SELECT SORG_NM FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS AS G START WITH G.SKT_ORG_ID = B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID CONNECT BY G.SKT_ORG_ID = PRIOR G.SUP_KT_ORG_ID ORDER BY G.SORG_PREF_ODRG) ) AS SPOS_DEPT_FULL_NM , D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , E.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SSVC_GROUP_CD , D.SSVC_OBJ_CD , F.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , G.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , H.SUSER_GRADE_NM

, A.SUSER_NM , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM , A.SPOS_DEPT_FULL_NM , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SUSER_GRADE_NM
, MST.TB_USER_BAS B , MST.TB_ORG_BAS C , MST.TB_LVL_BAS D , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD E , MST.TB_LVL_CD F , MST.TB_LVL_CD G , MST.TB_USER_GRADE_CD H

AND A.SUSER_ID = B.SUSER_ID(+) AND B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = C.SKT_ORG_ID(+) AND A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = D.NLVL_BAS_SEQ(+) AND D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = E.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND D.SSVC_GROUP_CD = F.SLVL_CD (+) AND D.SSVC_OBJ_CD = G.SLVL_CD (+) AND A.SUSER_GRADE_CD = H.SUSER_GRADE_CD(+)
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_USER_AUTH_TXN A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_USER_AUTH_TXN A

SELECT DISTINCT B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_USER_AUTH_TXN A ,MST.TB_LVL_BAS B ,MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD C ,MST.TB_LVL_CD D ,MST.TB_LVL_CD E WHERE 1=1 AND A.SUSER_ID = #{suserId, jdbcType=CHAR} AND A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = B.NLVL_BAS_SEQ AND B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND B.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD AND B.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD ORDER BY B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT COALESCE ( (SELECT DISTINCT SUSER_GRADE_CD FROM MST.TB_USER_AUTH_TXN WHERE SUSER_ID = #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LIMIT 1 ) , '')
